globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), autoplay=(), camera=(), display-capture=(), encrypted-media=(), fullscreen=(self), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), hid=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), midi=(), payment=(), picture-in-picture=(), publickey-credentials-get=(), screen-wake-lock=(), serial=(), sync-xhr=(), usb=(), xr-spatial-tracking=()
